meta.title: Wamply — WhatsApp Campaign Manager
meta.description: Amplify your WhatsApp campaigns with AI

hero.subtitle: Every contact gets the right message, at the right time, in the right language. Personalized by AI. Zero spam.

aiSpotlight.subtitleLead: No templates with variables to fill in by hand. One
aiSpotlight.subtitleTail: from Anthropic. You set the goal — AI writes, personalizes, optimizes. And gets better with every campaign.

cards.copyDesc: A short brief is enough: AI produces natural-sounding copy aligned with your brand voice.
cards.segmentDesc: Understands who is ready to buy, who needs nurturing, and who should be excluded.
cards.languageDesc: 50+ languages. Formal or friendly tone, picked based on the customer's context.
cards.learnDesc: Every reply is feedback: AI refines tone and timing for the next campaign.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: AI guides every step — you review and approve
howItWorks.step1Desc: Upload a CSV or add them manually. AI analyzes tags, history and data to suggest the most promising segments right away.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Tell AI what you want to achieve — the agent writes the copy, personalizes for each recipient, schedules delivery at the best time.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Monitor sends, reads and replies in real time. AI tells you what worked and how to improve the next campaign.

autoSelection.subtitleLead: Advanced reasoning where it matters, speed where it counts. You focus on the outcome — we handle the tech. You only pay in
autoSelection.subtitleTail: : the cost reflects the complexity of the task.
autoSelection.tier1Desc: Translations and high-volume personalization. Immediate response, minimal cost.
autoSelection.tier2Desc: Marketing copy, template improvement, chat agent. The sweet spot between quality and cost.
autoSelection.tier3Desc: Campaign planning, compliance checks, multi-step strategies that require deep analysis.
autoSelection.footnote: Automatic routing: nothing to configure. The right AI is picked for you.

pricing.title: Plans & pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your business

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AI credits and plans
faq.q1AnswerP1: Credits are the unit we use to measure AI usage on Wamply. Every AI operation consumes a predefined number of credits — for example generating a template costs 2 credits, personalizing a message 0.5 credits, planning a campaign 5 credits.
faq.q1AnswerP2End: . If you need more capacity, you can buy a top-up pack on demand.
faq.q2Question: Can I use my own Claude API key (BYOK)?
faq.q2AnswerP1Mid: plan onwards you can bring your own Anthropic API key ("Bring Your Own Key"). In BYOK mode you pay Anthropic directly for the tokens consumed and Wamply
faq.q2AnswerP2: Useful if you have high volumes, a direct contract with Anthropic, or you want granular control over AI costs. Configure it from Settings → AI in the dashboard.
faq.q3Question: What happens when I run out of credits?
faq.q3AnswerP1Pre: AI operations are blocked until your monthly plan renews. You can keep
faq.q3AnswerP1Tail: without interruption — WhatsApp delivery doesn't consume credits.
faq.q3AnswerP2Pre: To unlock AI right away you have two options: (1) buy a
faq.q3AnswerP2Tail: (100 to 10,000 credits, valid 12 months), or (2) upgrade to the next plan. At 80% consumption we send you a warning email, so you're never caught out.
